title: Completing the First Trimester
subtitle: A milestone in your journey
description: By week 12, you are reaching the end of the first trimester. Most major organs are formed, and your baby continues to grow and develop steadily. The risk of early complications significantly decreases at this stage.
what_to_expect: Major organs are fully formed and continue developing
Symptoms like nausea and fatigue may begin to reduce
care_tips: Continue a balanced diet with essential nutrients
Stay hydrated and maintain regular meal patterns
Engage in light physical activity if comfortable

medical_checkups.note: This stage often includes important first trimester screenings.

commonly_suggested.name: Nuchal Translucency Scan
commonly_suggested.purpose: Assesses risk of certain chromosomal conditions

commonly_suggested.name: First Trimester Blood Tests
commonly_suggested.purpose: Screens for genetic and health conditions

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor will guide you on the necessity and timing of these tests based on your individual health profile.

important_note: Completing the first trimester marks a significant milestone in your pregnancy journey.
reassurance: You have reached an important stage, and your pregnancy is progressing well.
medical_disclaimer: Discuss all screening results and next steps with your healthcare provider.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels continues to support healthy development.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be closely monitored during screening tests.
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent management supports a healthy progression.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support increased blood volume and ongoing growth.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be reviewed during blood tests.
anemia.reassurance: Proper nutrition supports your strength and well-being.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation and fetal health.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your health.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support continued development and metabolic stability.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during routine evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain balance during this stage.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As you complete the first trimester, managing multiple conditions requires consistent and mindful care.
priority_tips: Maintain a balanced and regular lifestyle
Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care supports a strong and healthy progression into the next stage.
